schedule.description: Cubs 7, Pirates 2 — Beat Skenes, Split Series
Cardinals Series Preview — 3 Games at Busch
NL Central Watch — Division Race Live
Ian Happ — 41 Straight at PNC Park

stories.title: Cubs 7, Pirates 2 — Beat Skenes, Split Pittsburgh Series
stories.angle: Cubs handed 2025 NL Cy Young winner Paul Skenes his 3rd straight loss. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits & 2 RBI. Two Pirates errors in the 6th were the decisive turning point. Cubs split 2-2 at Pittsburgh, leave at 31-26 heading to St. Louis.

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Cubs 7, Pirates 2. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits and 2 RBI. The Cubs handed Skenes his 3rd straight loss and split the Pittsburgh series.

Skenes fanned 10 in 5.1 IP but 2 Pittsburgh errors in the 6th gifted a 3-0 lead. Cubs leave Pittsburgh at 31-26. 🔥

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Cubs close out their 10-game losing-streak recovery with a series split and momentum heading into St. Louis.

stories.title: Cardinals Series Opener — 3 Games at Busch, 6:15 PM CT Tonight
stories.angle: Cubs (31-26) riding back-to-back wins into the NL Central rivalry series. Cardinals (29-25). 3 games at Busch Stadium. Lead with matchup+location per engine rule, stakes/rivalry as kicker.

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Cubs at Cardinals. 3 games at Busch Stadium, 6:15 PM CT tonight.

Cubs (31-26) riding back-to-back wins, fresh off handing Skenes his 3rd straight loss. Cardinals at 29-25 in the NL Central. Time to make a statement in St. Louis.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

**Why it matters:** Cubs-Cardinals is the NL Central's definitive rivalry. With Cubs at 31-26 riding back-to-back wins and Cardinals at 29-25, every series game has divisional implications. Engine rule: lead with matchup+location; stakes is the kicker.

stories.title: NL Central Watch — Cubs 31-26, Cardinals 29-25, Division Race Is Live
stories.angle: Both clubs within 2 games of each other chasing Milwaukee. This 3-game series at Busch has direct divisional implications.

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
NL Central: Cubs 31-26, Cardinals 29-25, Brewers leading the division.

Cubs and Cardinals are within 2 games of each other, both chasing Milwaukee. This weekend at Busch isn't just a rivalry — it's a potential turning point in the NL Central race. 📊

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW UP (ongoing division race tracking; updated with today's fresh records)

stories.title: Ian Happ — 41 Consecutive Games Reaching Base at PNC Park
stories.angle: Happ went 3-for-4 with a 2-run HR Thursday. 41 straight games reaching base at PNC Park. He grew up 15 miles from Pittsburgh. Bold/feature take.

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Ian Happ: 41 consecutive games reaching base at PNC Park. 🏡

He grew up 15 miles from Pittsburgh, and the numbers show it every time the Cubs roll into town. Went 3-for-4 Thursday with a 2-run HR in the 8th. The man has owned that ballpark.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW UP (yesterday's story noted 40 consecutive; now 41 after Thursday's game)

stories.title: Cubs Offense — Two Straight Wins, Heading to St. Louis with Momentum
stories.angle: After the 10-game skid, Cubs went 2-0 (10-4 over Pirates Wed, 7-2 over Skenes Thu). Happ + Suzuki contributing. Offense finding its form at the right time for a Cardinals series.

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Two wins to close Pittsburgh. After a 10-game skid, the Cubs offense is finding its form.

Happ: 2-run HR Thursday, 5 RBI Wednesday. Suzuki: 2 hits, 2 RBI Thursday. Cubs 2-0 since snapping the skid, heading to St. Louis at 31-26 with momentum. 📈

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW UP (offensive bounce-back from 10-game skid; 2-0 streak after snapping it)

stories.title: Iowa Cubs + Farm System — Hartshorn & Ayers Go Deep, Iowa Shutout Win
stories.angle: Iowa Cubs 1-0 shutout Wednesday. Hartshorn and Ayers both homered across affiliates. Farm system producing at multiple levels.

x_posts.label: Post 6A
x_posts.text:
Iowa Cubs won 1-0 Wednesday with dominant pitching. Hartshorn and Ayers both went deep across the Cubs' farm system.

The pipeline is loaded. No shortage of depth in this organization as June approaches and the NL Central race gets real. 🌱

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball
x_posts.tweet_type: NEW STORY (prospect update from May 28 Bleacher Nation report)

research.facts:

**Freshness:** ✓ May 28 (< 24 hours)
